meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Fix Debugging Issues (Beginner Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver flawless client projects.
content.answer_block: When debugging stalls, pivot your strategy: outsource the logic to AI agents while focusing your billable hours on high-value client communication. By using Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid resolution, you transform technical debt into a streamlined, automated workflow that keeps your freelance revenue scaling effortlessly.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the console spits out a wall of red text, and your client's deadline is breathing down your neck. You are stuck in the debugging loop, losing precious billable hours to syntax errors and logic traps that refuse to budge. It is the silent killer of freelance momentum.

But what if debugging wasn't a barrier, but a business asset? By shifting your focus from manual line-by-line fixing to strategic freelance pitching and AI-assisted resolution, you regain control. You aren't just a coder; you are a solution architect. Let’s turn that frustration into a polished, professional output.

steps.title: Analyze the Failure State
steps.description: Before pitching a solution, identify the root cause using AI diagnostic tools to ensure you understand the technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for recurring runtime errors and identify the top three bottlenecks causing performance lag.

steps.title: Document the Fix for Clients
steps.description: Turn the bug resolution into a value-add pitch by documenting the fix clearly for the client's internal records.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a technical summary of this bug fix, explaining the root cause and the preventive measures implemented for the client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude chat 'Summarize the recent fix in a professional email format for my client'

steps.title: Automate Regression Testing
steps.description: Prevent future bugs by embedding automated tests, making your pitch more robust and trustworthy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the current module to ensure no regressions occur during further development.

steps.title: Architectural Refactoring
steps.description: Pitch a refactor to the client that simplifies code maintenance, effectively eliminating the 'can't debug' problem for good.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this legacy module to be more modular and easier to debug, following clean code principles.

steps.title: Continuous Monitoring Setup
steps.description: Finalize your delivery by implementing an AI-monitored feedback loop so you are notified of bugs before the client is.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a monitoring script that alerts me when specific error patterns emerge in the production logs.

pro_tips: Always bill for 'Quality Assurance & AI Optimization' rather than just 'Debugging' to increase your perceived value.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your fixes; clients pay more for transparency than for silent code patches.
Never manually fix a bug twice; if it happens twice, build an automated script in Antigravity to handle it.
Keep a 'Bug Library' of common issues you've solved to speed up future freelance pitches.
Leverage AI to explain complex code to non-technical clients to build deeper trust and authority.
content.next_steps: Apply these steps to your current project, document your success rate, and use your newfound efficiency to pitch a higher-tier maintenance package to your existing clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Master the tools, refine your pitch, and start delivering projects that keep clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
